channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: Which two words have the most letters in them?
item.description:
Which two words have the most letters in them?
Post office.

item.title: Why did the amoeba flunk the math test?
item.description:
Why did the amoeba flunk the math test?
Because it multiplied by dividing.

item.title: Charlie: Hey, Mom, tomorrow there’s a small PTA meeting. Mom: What do you mean by “small”?
item.description:
Charlie: Hey, Mom, tomorrow there’s a small PTA meeting. Mom: What do you mean by “small”?
Charlie: Well, it’s just you, me, and the principal.

item.title: What did one math book say to the other?
item.description:
What did one math book say to the other?
“Man, I got a lot of problems!”

item.title: What was the snail doing on the highway?
item.description:
What was the snail doing on the highway?
About a mile a day.

item.title: What did one horse say to the other horse?
item.description:
What did one horse say to the other horse?
“Your pace is familiar, but I don’t remember your mane.”

item.title: What animal makes it hard to carry on a conversation?
item.description:
What animal makes it hard to carry on a conversation?
A goat, because he always wants to butt in.

item.title: What did the dalmatian say after he finished eating?
item.description:
What did the dalmatian say after he finished eating?
“That hit the spots.”

item.title: Where do little dogs sleep when they go camping?
item.description:
Where do little dogs sleep when they go camping?
In pup tents.

item.title: How does a leopard change its spots?
item.description:
How does a leopard change its spots?
When it’s tired of one spot, it just moves to another.
